message:
test(lifecycle): diag artifact paths nest inside data_dir (ibuuh.19)

ibuuh.19 retention-safety row. Derivative-asset retention/quarantine/
garbage-collection can only operate safely if every cass-managed
artifact path lives inside the declared data_dir. If an artifact
escapes (e.g. db_path points somewhere outside data_dir because a
flag default changed), GC either misses the artifact (retention leak)
or deletes outside its jurisdiction (data loss).

New test diag_artifact_paths_nest_inside_data_dir_for_safe_gc asserts:
 * paths.db_path starts with paths.data_dir
 * paths.index_path starts with paths.data_dir
 * paths.data_dir starts with the test HOME (XDG_DATA_HOME/HOME pin
   must be honored — no ambient state leak)

Catches flag-default drift and path-resolution bugs that would break
retention's jurisdiction contract before they reach production.

VERIFICATION:
cargo test --test lifecycle_matrix diag_artifact_paths: 1/1 pass.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.19; bead stays
open for the quarantine/GC runtime half that still needs upstream
subsystems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
